nl_query: Show the complete timeline for each board created last month: creation date, first script assignment date, first evaluation attempt start date, first freeze date, last submission date, and the total number of days the board has been open.
failed_sql: SELECT b.id, b.created_at AS board_creation_date, MIN(sa.assigned_at) AS first_script_assignment_date, MIN(ea.started_at) AS first_evaluation_attempt_start_date, MIN(ea.frozen_at) AS first_freeze_date, MAX(ea.submitted_at) AS last_submission_date, (MAX(ea.submitted_at) - b.created_at) / 86400 AS days_open FROM board b JOIN script_assignment sa ON sa.board_id = b.id JOIN evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.board_id = b.id WHERE b.created_at >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month') AND b.created_at < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY b.id ORDER BY b.created_at DESC LIMIT 200;
error: Validation failed (schema): Unknown table or alias 'answer_script' referenced in 'answer_script.id'. Ensure it is declared in the FROM/JOIN clause.
